---
title: "Collaborator Analysis"
format: html
author: "Anna Poulton" 
---

# Exercise: Explore, Clean, and Wrangle Data


## Set up
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
```

## Clean data

```{r}
lobster_traps <- readr::read_csv(here::here("data", "Lobster_Trap_Counts_All_Years_20210519.csv")) %>%
    janitor::clean_names()

head(lobster_traps)
colnames(lobster_traps)
str(lobster_traps)
```
